evidence_excerpt: Residual pulmonary damage was serious, and both tracheotomy and chronic artificial ventilatory assistance have since been required. Although, as of writing, he had been seizure free for more than 3 years, he lacked head control and visual following, and could neither speak nor sit up.

quality_of_life.functional_status_evidence_excerpt: He lacked head control and visual following, and could neither speak nor sit up.
quality_of_life.symptom_burden_evidence_excerpt: Marked spasticity in all four limbs with exaggerated deep tendon reflexes; chronic tracheotomy and artificial ventilatory assistance required.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: The residual pulmonary damage was serious, and both tracheotomy and chronic artificial ventilatory assistance have since been required.
As of writing, he had been seizure free for more than 3 years on valproate and clonazepam.

notes_on_uncertainty: Information pertains to Case 3. The tracheotomy and ventilator dependence were initiated before the diagnosis date but remained ongoing afterward; timing categories are approximate relative to diagnosis. Reported ages at diagnosis vary in the document (5y7m vs 7y5m), so diagnosis date is treated as an approximate reference point.
